title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
